title: STRENGTH CHALLENGE
description: Climb a {nivel_usuario} grade boulder using only {numero} fingers on your main hand.

title: COLOR CHALLENGE
description: Climb an easy boulder using only {color_presa} holds.

title: BALANCE CHALLENGE
description: Climb a {nivel_usuario} grade boulder without using your {parte_cuerpo}.

title: SPEED CHALLENGE
description: Complete a boulder of {color_presa} holds in under {segundos} seconds.

title: COORDINATED CHALLENGE
description: On your next {nivel_usuario} grade boulder, touch each new hold for {segundos} seconds before advancing.
